examples: The population of the spruce budworm, the warbler's favorite prey in North America, has been dropping.
Scientists have now investigated the effects of the spraying of Matacil, one of the anti-budworm agents that is least toxic to insect-pollinators.
Is tomato plant the host of the oriental tobacco budworm, Helicoverpa assulta (Guenﾃｩe)?
